name: Hyperon
description: Hyperon — feature flag and configuration management platform with secrets support for cloud apps.

seo.title: Hyperon — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Hyperon: Hyperon — feature flag and configuration management platform with secrets support for cloud apps.

when_to_use: Feature flag-gated secrets for staged production rollouts
Runtime configuration management for cloud microservices
Environment-specific secret injection via config API
Secrets versioning with rollback for incident response
Multi-tenant config isolation for SaaS platform deployments

pros: Combines feature flags with config and secrets
cons: Secrets story is thinner than flags story
Mixing flags and secrets can complicate audit
review.verdict: Interesting if you want flags and config in one place, but not a dedicated secrets vault.
review.best_for: Teams willing to co-locate feature flags and runtime config with light secrets.
review.not_for: Security teams wanting a hardened, audit-ready secrets backend.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
